subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath illumined the horizon of the world through the radiance of His Most Great Name, whereby all the tribes were seized with trembling [3.5s]... ...There can be no doubt that whatsoever hath been revealed from the All-Glorious Pen, be it ordinances of prohibitions, conferreth benefits upon the believers themselves
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من انار افق العالم بنیر اسمه الاعظم الذی به اخذت الزلازل کل القبائل
subcodes.subjects: @law of Huququ'llah, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @literal interpretation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @personal instructions, @transcendence; unknowability of God
